query:
SELECT won, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM team_matches WHERE teamNumber = '81777A' GROUP BY won;
SELECT allianceScore, opponentScore, won FROM team_matches WHERE teamNumber = '81777A' LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2QKfi1Ndea9wXr8.root --database 4tK87PRTpvQf5EmMsJgnMM --execute SELECT won, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM team_matches WHERE teamNumber = '81777A' GROUP BY won;
SELECT allianceScore, opponentScore, won FROM team_matches WHERE teamNumber = '81777A' LIMIT 5;
